remarks: Enjoy easy living in this updated, move-in-ready home that combines comfort, style, and convenience. Offering 3 spacious bedrooms and 2 recently renovated full bathrooms, this inviting rental also features beautiful hardwood floors and recessed lighting throughout the main living area. The updated kitchen opens to the dining area, where sliding glass doors lead to an elevated deck-perfect for morning coffee, outdoor dining, or relaxing at the end of the day. Downstairs, the finished lower level provides flexible space for a family room, home office, or gym, with direct access to a private patio and fully fenced backyard. An attached garage and generous storage area with convenient barn-door access add to the home's everyday functionality. Ideally located in one of Norwalk's most convenient neighborhoods, you'll be just minutes from Westport Avenue shopping and dining, the restaurants and waterfront of SoNo, Calf Pasture Beach, I-95, and the East Norwalk train station. Whether you're commuting or enjoying everything the area has to offer, this home delivers the perfect combination of comfort, convenience, and location.
